lines.en_lit: Let us restore and let us again take a handful during the day. He taught and he said its Service vessels, consecrate even not at time

raises an objection This is the principle: Any that is sacrificed during the day is consecrated during the day; and any that is sacrificed at night is consecrated at night; and any that is sacrificed both during the day and at night is consecrated both during the day and at night. In any case, it is teaching any that is sacrificed during the day is consecrated during the day. During the day, yes, at night, no, Perhaps it is not consecrated to be sacrificed however, it is consecrated to be disqualified.
Rabbi Zeira raised an objection arranged bread and the vessels after Shabbat, he burned the vessels on Shabbat, disqualified.
How shall he proceed He should leave to the following Shabbat, as even if remained on the table for many days, that not matter. And why it is consecrated and disqualified.
Rava said: who raises the objection, raises the objection well. And the father of Rabbi Avin is also stating a baraita. And maintains: night not premature. a day premature.

when Shabbat evening be consecrated and disqualified Ravina said: one removed before Mar Zutra, and some say Rav Ashi, said: Even you say that one did not remove before since he arranged not in accordance with its mitzva becomes as a monkey arranged
This was the principle in the Temple: Granted, feet, due to drops However, hands, what is the reason Rabbi Abba said: That is to say
